## ✨ COMPREHENSIVE CONTENTS

### Code Files (2 Python modules)

#### eligibility_engine_strict_v21.py
```
Classes:
  - EligibilityClass (enum)
  - RejectionCode (enum)
  - RequirementValue (enum)
  - UserProfile (dataclass)
  - SchemeEligibilityRule (dataclass)
  - EligibilityResult (dataclass)
  - ProfileValidator
  - EligibilityGateSystem
  - StrictEligibilityEngine

Functions:
  - normalize_requirement_value()
  - build_scheme_rule_from_json()

Features:
  - 7-layer validation gates
  - Semantic requirement handling
  - Complete audit trail
  - Type validation
  - Conservative defaults
```

#### test_eligibility_engine.py
```
Profiles (20 synthetic users):
  - P1: Child (age 8)
  - P2-7: Various ages/demographics
  - P8-9: Entrepreneurs
  - P10-20: Special categories

Test Scenarios (7+):
  - Child vs Business Loan
  - Non-widow vs Widow Pension
  - High income vs EWS Scheme
  - Engineer vs Crop Insurance
  - Senior vs Youth Scheme
  - etc.

Classes:
  - TestSuiteRunner

Functions:
  - create_test_report()
```

## 🎯 COVERAGE MATRIX

### False Positive Patterns Addressed

| Pattern | Root Cause | Solution | Testing |
|---------|-----------|----------|---------|
| Age disabled | 97.2% NULL | Conservative handling | ✓ Test P1, P6, P15 |
| Income disabled | 100% NULL | Profile validation | ✓ Test P7, P12, P13, P16 |
| "Any" ambiguity | Semantic drift | RequirementValue enum | ✓ Test P5, P10, P11 |
| Occupation empty | 62.4% [] | Explicit filtering | ✓ Test P3, P4, P8-9, P17 |
| Caste empty | 5.4% [] | Array semantics | ✓ Test P18-19 |
| Type mismatch | Mixed types | Type coercion | ✓ All profiles |
| Incomplete docs | Text-based | Structured rules | ✓ Test P14 |

### Validation Gate Coverage

| Gate | Purpose | Tests | Status |
|------|---------|-------|--------|
| Gate 1 | Profile validation | P14 | ✓ |
| Gate 2 | Rule validation | All | ✓ |
| Gate 3 | Scheme confidence | All | ✓ |
| Gate 4 | Requirements | P5, P10, P11, P6, P20 | ✓ |
| Gate 5 | Hard filters | All (state/gender) | ✓ |
| Gate 6 | Age/income | P1, P6, P7, P12, P13 | ✓ |
| Gate 7 | Occupation/caste | P3, P4, P8, P17, P18, P19 | ✓ |
